events.summary_en: OpenAI released ChatGPT as a free research preview with a dialogue interface that could answer follow-ups, acknowledge mistakes, challenge false premises, and reject inappropriate requests.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 以免費研究預覽形式推出 ChatGPT；其對話介面能回答追問、承認錯誤、質疑不實前提並拒絕不當要求。

events.summary_en: The December 15 ChatGPT version improved general performance and became less likely to refuse answerable requests.
events.summary_zh: 12 月 15 日版 ChatGPT 改善整體效能，並降低對可回答要求的不必要拒絕。

events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling out saved conversation history with controls to view, rename, and delete past chats.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始推出已儲存的對話紀錄，使用者可查看、重新命名與刪除過往聊天。

events.summary_en: OpenAI began testing a daily ChatGPT message cap for some users, with extended access available in exchange for feedback.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 對部分使用者測試 ChatGPT 每日訊息上限，並提供以回饋換取延長使用的選項。

events.title_zh: ChatGPT 品質與事實性更新
events.summary_en: OpenAI updated ChatGPT to perform better across a broad range of topics with improved factuality.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 更新 ChatGPT，使其在廣泛主題上的表現與事實準確度提升。

events.summary_en: ChatGPT added a control that lets users stop a response while it is being generated.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增控制按鈕，讓使用者能在回覆生成途中立即停止。

events.title_zh: 事實性與數學能力改善
events.summary_en: OpenAI upgraded the ChatGPT model with improved factuality and mathematical capabilities.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 升級 ChatGPT 模型，改善事實準確度與數學能力。

events.summary_en: OpenAI announced a $20-per-month ChatGPT plan with peak-time access, faster responses, and priority access to new features.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布每月 20 美元的 ChatGPT 方案，提供尖峰時段存取、更快回覆與新功能優先使用權。

events.title_zh: Default 與 Turbo 模型選擇器
events.summary_en: Plus users began receiving a model dropdown with Standard and speed-optimized Turbo options.
events.summary_zh: Plus 使用者開始獲得模型下拉選單，可在標準版與速度最佳化的 Turbo 版之間切換。

events.title_zh: ChatGPT Plus 擴展至國際市場
events.summary_en: OpenAI expanded ChatGPT Plus availability beyond the United States to international customers.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT Plus 從美國擴展至其他國家的客戶。

events.summary_en: OpenAI updated the ChatGPT model used on the free plan to serve more users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 更新免費方案所使用的 ChatGPT 模型，以服務更多使用者。

events.title_en: Faster Turbo becomes the Plus default
events.title_zh: 較快的 Turbo 成為 Plus 預設
events.summary_en: OpenAI made the faster model formerly called Turbo the default for Plus users while temporarily retaining the prior version.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將先前稱為 Turbo 的較快模型設為 Plus 預設，同時暫時保留舊版本。

events.summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-4, a large multimodal model with stronger reasoning and instruction following, and made it available to ChatGPT Plus subscribers.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布具更強推理與指令遵循能力的大型多模態模型 GPT-4，並向 ChatGPT Plus 訂閱者開放。

events.summary_en: OpenAI announced initial plugin support so ChatGPT could access current information, run computations, or use third-party services.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 ChatGPT 初步支援外掛，使其能取得即時資訊、執行運算或使用第三方服務。

events.summary_en: OpenAI introduced an experimental browsing model that could retrieve up-to-date web information for ChatGPT.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出實驗性瀏覽模型，讓 ChatGPT 能擷取最新網路資訊。

events.summary_en: OpenAI introduced an experimental ChatGPT model that could run Python and handle file uploads and downloads.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出可執行 Python 並處理檔案上傳與下載的實驗性 ChatGPT 模型。

events.summary_en: ChatGPT added a setting to turn off history; those conversations would not train models, would not appear in the sidebar, and would be retained for 30 days for abuse monitoring.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增關閉聊天紀錄的設定；相關對話不會用於模型訓練、不會出現在側邊欄，僅為濫用監測保留 30 天。
events.source_name: New ways to manage your data in ChatGPT

events.summary_en: OpenAI added an export option that emails users a file containing their conversations and other relevant ChatGPT account data.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 新增匯出選項，會以電子郵件寄送包含對話與其他相關 ChatGPT 帳戶資料的檔案。
events.source_name: New ways to manage your data in ChatGPT

events.title_zh: 宣布淘汰 Legacy GPT-3.5 模型
events.summary_en: OpenAI announced that the Legacy GPT-3.5 option would be deprecated on May 10; existing conversations could continue but new messages would use the default model.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 宣布 Legacy GPT-3.5 選項將於 5 月 10 日淘汰；既有對話仍可延續，但新訊息會改用預設模型。

events.title_en: Web browsing beta rolls out to Plus
events.title_zh: 網路瀏覽 Beta 推向 Plus
events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling web browsing to all Plus users through a new beta-features settings panel.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始透過新的 Beta 功能設定面板，向所有 Plus 使用者推出網路瀏覽。

events.title_en: Plugins beta rolls out to Plus
events.title_zh: 外掛 Beta 推向 Plus
events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling third-party plugins and the Plugin Store to all Plus users through the beta-features panel.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始透過 Beta 功能面板，向所有 Plus 使用者推出第三方外掛與 Plugin Store。

events.title_zh: 超出長度後可繼續生成
events.summary_en: ChatGPT added a control to continue a response beyond its maximum token limit, counting each continuation against the message allowance.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增在回覆達到最大 token 長度後繼續生成的功能，每次續寫會計入訊息額度。

events.title_en: Introducing the ChatGPT app for iOS
events.summary_en: OpenAI launched a free iOS app in the United States with conversation syncing, Whisper voice input, and Plus access to GPT-4.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 在美國推出免費 iOS App，支援對話同步、Whisper 語音輸入，以及 Plus 使用 GPT-4。
events.source_name: Introducing the ChatGPT app for iOS

events.title_en: ChatGPT iOS expands to 11 more countries
events.title_zh: ChatGPT iOS 再擴展至 11 國
events.summary_en: OpenAI expanded the iOS app from its U.S. launch to 11 additional countries and regions.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 iOS App 從美國擴展至另外 11 個國家與地區。

events.summary_en: ChatGPT began testing shareable conversation links that recipients could view or copy into their own chats.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 開始測試可分享的對話連結，接收者可查看或複製至自己的聊天。

events.title_zh: 更深入整合 Browse with Bing
events.summary_en: ChatGPT browsing exposed clickable Bing queries so users could inspect the searches the model performed.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 瀏覽功能加入可點擊的 Bing 查詢，讓使用者檢視模型執行的搜尋。

events.summary_en: The iOS app added a local control to disable chat history and model-training use for new conversations.
events.summary_zh: iOS App 新增本機控制，可關閉新對話的聊天紀錄與模型訓練用途。

events.summary_en: Plus users could enable Browse with Bing in the mobile app to answer questions with current web information.
events.summary_zh: Plus 使用者可在行動 App 中啟用 Browse with Bing，以最新網路資訊回答問題。

events.title_zh: 行動版搜尋紀錄深層連結
events.summary_en: Tapping a mobile search result began taking users directly to the corresponding point in a conversation.
events.summary_zh: 點擊行動版搜尋結果後，會直接跳至對話中的對應位置。

events.summary_en: OpenAI temporarily disabled Browse after finding it could reproduce page content in unintended ways, including fulfilling requests for full URL text.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 發現 Browse 可能以非預期方式重現頁面內容，包括滿足取得完整網址文字的要求，因此暫時停用。

events.title_en: Code Interpreter beta rolls out to all Plus users
events.title_zh: Code Interpreter Beta 推向所有 Plus 使用者
events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling Code Interpreter on the web to every Plus user, enabling code execution and uploaded-file analysis.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向所有 Plus 使用者推出網頁版 Code Interpreter，可執行程式碼並分析上傳檔案。

events.summary_en: OpenAI doubled the GPT-4 allowance for Plus users to 40 messages every three hours.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Plus 使用者的 GPT-4 額度加倍至每三小時 40 則訊息。

events.summary_en: OpenAI introduced Custom Instructions for Plus users so persistent preferences could guide future ChatGPT conversations.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 向 Plus 使用者推出自訂指示，讓持久化偏好能引導之後的 ChatGPT 對話。

events.title_en: Introducing the ChatGPT app for Android
events.summary_en: OpenAI launched ChatGPT for Android in the United States, India, Bangladesh, and Brazil, with more countries planned the following week.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 在美國、印度、孟加拉與巴西推出 ChatGPT Android App，並計畫隔週擴展至更多國家。

events.title_en: Prompt examples, suggested replies, and keyboard shortcuts
events.title_zh: 提示範例、建議回覆與鍵盤捷徑
events.summary_en: ChatGPT added starter prompt examples, suggested follow-up replies, longer login sessions, and keyboard shortcuts.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增起始提示範例、建議追問、更長的登入時效與鍵盤捷徑。

events.title_en: ChatGPT remembers the selected GPT-4 model
events.title_zh: ChatGPT 記住所選 GPT-4 模式
events.summary_en: Plus users no longer defaulted back to GPT-3.5 when starting a new chat; ChatGPT remembered the previously selected GPT-4 mode.
events.summary_zh: Plus 使用者開新聊天時不再自動回到 GPT-3.5；ChatGPT 會記住所選的 GPT-4 模式。

events.title_zh: Code Interpreter 支援多檔上傳
events.summary_en: Plus users could upload multiple files to Code Interpreter for combined data analysis and insight generation.
events.summary_zh: Plus 使用者可向 Code Interpreter 上傳多個檔案，進行合併資料分析與洞察生成。

events.title_zh: 自訂指示開放免費使用者
events.summary_en: Custom Instructions became available on the free plan outside the European Union and United Kingdom.
events.summary_zh: 自訂指示向歐盟與英國以外的免費方案使用者開放。

events.title_en: Custom Instructions reaches the EU and UK
events.title_zh: 自訂指示開放歐盟與英國
events.summary_en: OpenAI expanded Custom Instructions availability to users in the European Union and United Kingdom.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將自訂指示擴展至歐盟與英國使用者。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Enterprise with enterprise privacy and security, unlimited faster GPT-4, 32K context, Advanced Data Analysis, and admin controls.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Enterprise，提供企業級隱私與安全、無上限高速 GPT-4、32K 上下文、進階資料分析與管理控制。

events.title_zh: ChatGPT 介面語言支援 Alpha
events.summary_en: ChatGPT web began an opt-in alpha for nine interface languages, including Traditional Chinese.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版開始測試九種介面語言的選用 Alpha，包括繁體中文。

events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling two-way voice conversations with five preset voices to Plus users on iOS and Android.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 iOS 與 Android 的 Plus 使用者推出雙向語音對話，提供五種預設聲音。
events.source_name: ChatGPT can now see, hear, and speak

events.summary_en: OpenAI began making one-or-more-image input available to Plus users across platforms, including a mobile drawing tool to direct attention.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向各平台 Plus 使用者開放一張或多張圖像輸入，並在行動版提供繪圖工具以指示關注區域。
events.source_name: ChatGPT can now see, hear, and speak

events.summary_en: Browse with Bing returned to all Plus users with current web information and direct links to sources.
events.summary_zh: Browse with Bing 重返所有 Plus 使用者，提供最新網路資訊與來源直接連結。

events.title_en: DALL-E 3 rolls out in ChatGPT beta
events.title_zh: DALL-E 3 在 ChatGPT 展開 Beta
events.summary_en: OpenAI began integrating DALL-E 3 into ChatGPT on web and mobile so GPT-4 users could generate images conversationally.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始在 ChatGPT 網頁與行動版整合 DALL-E 3，讓 GPT-4 使用者能以對話生成圖像。

events.summary_en: Browsing moved out of beta for Plus and Enterprise users and no longer required a beta-features toggle.
events.summary_zh: 瀏覽功能對 Plus 與 Enterprise 使用者脫離 Beta，不再需要啟用 Beta 功能開關。

events.title_en: DALL-E 3 available in ChatGPT Plus and Enterprise
events.title_zh: DALL-E 3 開放 ChatGPT Plus 與 Enterprise
events.summary_en: DALL-E 3 became available to Plus and Enterprise users for conversational image creation and iterative revisions inside ChatGPT.
events.summary_zh: DALL-E 3 向 Plus 與 Enterprise 使用者開放，可在 ChatGPT 內以對話生成圖像並反覆修改。
events.source_name: DALL-E 3 is now available in ChatGPT Plus and Enterprise

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched a GPT-4 Turbo preview with knowledge through April 2023, a 128K context window, improved capability, and lower API prices.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-4 Turbo 預覽，知識更新至 2023 年 4 月，具 128K 上下文、更強能力與更低 API 價格。
events.source_name: New models and developer products announced at DevDay

events.summary_en: OpenAI introduced user-created custom versions of ChatGPT that combine instructions, knowledge, and capabilities and can be shared with others.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出由使用者建立的 ChatGPT 自訂版本，可結合指示、知識與能力並分享給他人。

events.title_en: ChatGPT Voice available to all free users
events.title_zh: ChatGPT Voice 開放所有免費使用者
events.summary_en: OpenAI expanded mobile voice conversations from paid access to all ChatGPT free users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將行動版語音對話從付費存取擴展至所有 ChatGPT 免費使用者。

events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling out a store for discovering community-built GPTs to ChatGPT Plus, Team, and Enterprise users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 ChatGPT Plus、Team 與 Enterprise 使用者推出可探索社群 GPT 的商店。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched a self-serve team plan with a secure collaborative workspace, admin controls, advanced models and tools, and no training on business data.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出自助式團隊方案，提供安全協作工作區、管理控制、進階模型與工具，且不以企業資料訓練模型。

events.summary_en: OpenAI began testing cross-chat memory with a small portion of Free and Plus users, including conversational controls to remember, inspect, forget, or disable memories.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始對少量 Free 與 Plus 使用者測試跨聊天記憶，並提供以對話要求記住、檢視、忘記或停用記憶的控制。
events.source_name: Memory and new controls for ChatGPT

events.title_en: Temporary Chat for conversations without memory
events.title_zh: 不使用記憶的 Temporary Chat
events.summary_en: OpenAI introduced Temporary Chat for conversations that do not appear in history, do not use memory, and are not used to train models.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Temporary Chat；這類對話不出現在紀錄、不使用記憶，也不會用於模型訓練。
events.source_name: Memory and new controls for ChatGPT

events.summary_en: OpenAI unveiled Sora, a text-conditioned video-generation model capable of producing up to one minute of high-fidelity video, as research progress rather than a public product.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 公布文字條件式影片生成模型 Sora，可生成最長一分鐘的高擬真影片；當時屬研究進展而非公開產品。
events.source_name: Video generation models as world simulators

events.title_en: Start using ChatGPT without signing up
events.title_zh: 無須註冊即可使用 ChatGPT
events.summary_en: OpenAI began gradually allowing people to use ChatGPT instantly without creating an account.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始逐步允許使用者無須建立帳戶即可立即使用 ChatGPT。

events.title_en: Memory available to ChatGPT Plus users
events.title_zh: 記憶功能開放 ChatGPT Plus
events.summary_en: ChatGPT Memory became available to Plus users outside Europe and Korea, with settings to review or disable it.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 記憶功能向歐洲與韓國以外的 Plus 使用者開放，並可在設定中檢視或停用。

events.summary_en: OpenAI announced GPT-4o, its omni flagship model designed to reason across audio, vision, and text in real time, and initially released text and image inputs with text output.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布可即時跨音訊、視覺與文字推理的全模態旗艦模型 GPT-4o，首波開放文字與圖像輸入、文字輸出。

events.title_en: GPT-4o and advanced tools roll out to free users
events.title_zh: GPT-4o 與進階工具推向免費使用者
events.summary_en: OpenAI began giving Free users limited GPT-4o plus web answers, data analysis, charts, image discussion, file uploads, GPT Store access, and memory.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 Free 使用者提供有限的 GPT-4o，以及網路回答、資料分析、圖表、圖像討論、檔案上傳、GPT Store 與記憶。
events.source_name: Introducing GPT-4o and more tools to ChatGPT free users

events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling out a macOS desktop app to Plus users with Option-Space access, screenshot discussion, and voice conversations, with broader availability planned.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 Plus 使用者推出 macOS 桌面 App，支援 Option-Space 快速喚起、截圖討論與語音對話，之後再擴大開放。
events.source_name: Introducing GPT-4o and more tools to ChatGPT free users

events.summary_en: OpenAI introduced a friendlier visual redesign with a new home screen and message layout.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出更親和的視覺改版，包含新的首頁與訊息版面。
events.source_name: Introducing GPT-4o and more tools to ChatGPT free users

events.title_en: Improvements to data analysis in ChatGPT
events.summary_en: GPT-4o data analysis gained direct Google Drive and OneDrive uploads, expandable tables and charts, and customizable downloadable visualizations for paid plans.
events.summary_zh: GPT-4o 資料分析新增 Google Drive 與 OneDrive 直接上傳、可展開表格與圖表，以及可自訂下載的視覺化，向付費方案開放。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched a university offering powered by GPT-4o with advanced tools, higher limits, shared GPTs, enterprise security, and no training on institutional conversations or data.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出由 GPT-4o 驅動的大學方案，提供進階工具、更高額度、共享 GPT、企業級安全，且不以機構對話或資料訓練模型。

events.title_en: ChatGPT integration announced for Apple Intelligence
events.title_zh: 宣布 ChatGPT 整合 Apple Intelligence
events.summary_en: OpenAI and Apple announced GPT-4o-powered ChatGPT integration for Siri and systemwide Writing Tools in iOS, iPadOS, and macOS, with no account required for free access.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 與 Apple 宣布將 GPT-4o 驅動的 ChatGPT 整合至 iOS、iPadOS 與 macOS 的 Siri 和系統級 Writing Tools，免費使用無須帳戶。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched GPT-4o mini as a small, cost-efficient multimodal model and began replacing GPT-3.5 in ChatGPT's free-user fallback path.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出小型且具成本效率的多模態模型 GPT-4o mini，並開始取代 ChatGPT 免費使用者的 GPT-3.5 備援路徑。

events.title_en: New compliance and administrative tools for ChatGPT Enterprise
events.title_zh: ChatGPT Enterprise 新增合規與管理工具
events.summary_en: OpenAI launched an Enterprise Compliance API and integrations, announced SCIM provisioning, and expanded administrative controls over GPTs and action domains.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Enterprise Compliance API 與整合，宣布 SCIM 佈建，並擴充對 GPT 與動作網域的管理控制。
events.source_name: New compliance and administrative tools for ChatGPT Enterprise

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched a temporary search prototype to a small group of users and publishers, combining conversational models with timely web answers and explicit source links.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 向少量使用者與出版商推出暫時性的搜尋原型，結合對話模型、即時網路答案與清楚的來源連結。

events.summary_en: The macOS app added a persistent side-by-side companion window with customizable Option-Space activation and conversation pop-outs.
events.summary_zh: macOS App 新增可並排常駐的 Companion Window，支援自訂 Option-Space 啟動與將既有對話彈出。

events.summary_en: ChatGPT macOS gained expandable interactive tables and charts, chart customization and download, and cell-level table selection.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS 新增可展開互動表格與圖表、圖表自訂與下載，以及表格儲存格級選取。

events.title_zh: ChatGPT 免費使用者可用 DALL-E 3
events.summary_en: OpenAI began allowing Free users to create up to two DALL-E 3 images per day in ChatGPT.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始允許 Free 使用者每天在 ChatGPT 中建立最多兩張 DALL-E 3 圖像。

events.summary_en: OpenAI shipped a non-frontier GPT-4o update that users tended to prefer in experiments and qualitative feedback, while noting the difficulty of characterizing granular behavior changes.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布非前沿級的 GPT-4o 更新；實驗與質性回饋顯示使用者較偏好此版，同時說明細緻描述行為變化仍有困難。

events.summary_en: GPT-4o in ChatGPT improved its use of uploaded files and its ability to update memory with key conversation details.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 中的 GPT-4o 改善了上傳檔案的運用，以及將對話關鍵內容更新至記憶的能力。

events.title_zh: 記憶功能擴展至各 ChatGPT 方案
events.summary_en: OpenAI expanded Memory to Free, Plus, Team, and Enterprise users and added visible memory-update notices with direct access to memory management.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將記憶擴展至 Free、Plus、Team 與 Enterprise，並新增可見的記憶更新提示與直接管理入口。
events.source_name: Memory and new controls for ChatGPT

events.summary_en: OpenAI released the first preview of its reasoning model series in ChatGPT and the API, designed to spend more time thinking through difficult science, coding, and math problems.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 與 API 發布首個推理模型系列預覽，設計上會花更多時間思考困難的科學、程式與數學問題。

events.summary_en: OpenAI released o1-mini as a faster, cheaper reasoning model focused especially on coding, initially available alongside o1-preview to ChatGPT Plus and Team users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布速度更快、成本更低且特別聚焦程式工作的推理模型 o1-mini，首波與 o1-preview 一同向 ChatGPT Plus 與 Team 開放。

events.title_en: o1-preview and o1-mini rate limits increased
events.title_zh: 提高 o1-preview 與 o1-mini 使用上限
events.summary_en: OpenAI raised ChatGPT limits to 50 o1-preview queries per week and 50 o1-mini queries per day.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT 額度提高至 o1-preview 每週 50 次、o1-mini 每日 50 次。

events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling GPT-4o-native Advanced Voice to Plus and Team users with low-latency conversation, nonverbal-cue awareness, and emotional expressiveness.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始向 Plus 與 Team 推出 GPT-4o 原生的 Advanced Voice，具低延遲對話、非語言線索感知與情緒表達。

events.summary_en: OpenAI introduced a GPT-4o-powered collaborative workspace for writing and coding, with direct editing, inline feedback, shortcuts, and version restoration, initially for Plus and Team.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出由 GPT-4o 驅動的寫作與程式協作工作區，支援直接編輯、行內回饋、捷徑與版本還原，首波向 Plus 與 Team 開放。

events.summary_en: OpenAI released an early Windows app to Plus, Team, Enterprise, and Edu users with an Alt-Space companion window.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 向 Plus、Team、Enterprise 與 Edu 推出 Windows App 搶先版，包含 Alt-Space Companion Window。

events.summary_en: The Windows app added hands-free Advanced Voice conversations with interruption support and emotion-aware responses.
events.summary_zh: Windows App 新增免手持的 Advanced Voice 對話，支援打斷與情緒感知回覆。

events.summary_en: The Windows app added Control-K search across prior conversations.
events.summary_zh: Windows App 新增 Control-K，可搜尋過往對話。

events.summary_en: The macOS app added Advanced Voice Mode for real-time, interruptible, emotionally expressive desktop conversations.
events.summary_zh: macOS App 新增 Advanced Voice Mode，提供即時、可打斷且具情緒表達的桌面對話。

events.title_en: o1 models and Apple Handoff on macOS
events.title_zh: macOS 支援 o1 模型與 Apple Handoff
events.summary_en: ChatGPT macOS added o1-preview and o1-mini, Apple Handoff with iOS, draft restoration, in-conversation find, and completion notifications.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS 新增 o1-preview、o1-mini、與 iOS 的 Apple Handoff、草稿還原、對話內搜尋及完成通知。

events.summary_en: OpenAI integrated web search into ChatGPT with automatic or manual activation, timely answers, source links, and new visual treatments for weather, stocks, sports, news, and maps.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將網路搜尋整合進 ChatGPT，可自動或手動啟動，提供即時答案、來源連結，以及天氣、股票、運動、新聞與地圖的新視覺呈現。

events.title_zh: ChatGPT 中的 GPT-4o mini 更新
events.summary_en: OpenAI updated GPT-4o mini for Free, Plus, Team, and logged-out ChatGPT users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 更新供 Free、Plus、Team 與未登入 ChatGPT 使用者使用的 GPT-4o mini。

events.title_en: Take and attach photos in the Windows app
events.title_zh: Windows App 可拍照並附加
events.summary_en: ChatGPT Windows added webcam capture for attaching a photo directly to a conversation.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT Windows 新增網路攝影機拍照，可直接將照片附加到對話。

events.title_en: Attach screenshots in the Windows app
events.title_zh: Windows App 可附加螢幕截圖
events.summary_en: ChatGPT Windows integrated the Snipping Tool to capture a window, full screen, or custom region and insert it into a chat.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT Windows 整合 Snipping Tool，可擷取視窗、全螢幕或自訂區域並插入聊天。

events.title_en: Work with Apps beta on macOS
events.summary_en: ChatGPT macOS gained an early beta that could read content from supported coding apps to provide context-aware answers for Plus and Team users.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS 新增搶先 Beta，可讀取支援的程式開發 App 內容，為 Plus 與 Team 使用者提供具上下文的回答。

events.title_en: Model picker and Temporary Chat in the macOS chat bar
events.title_zh: macOS 聊天列加入模型選擇與 Temporary Chat
events.summary_en: The redesigned macOS chat bar added direct model switching and a Temporary Chat toggle.
events.summary_zh: 重新設計的 macOS 聊天列加入直接切換模型與 Temporary Chat 開關。

events.title_zh: Advanced Voice 登陸 ChatGPT Web
events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling Advanced Voice on chatgpt.com to paid Plus, Team, Enterprise, and Edu users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始在 chatgpt.com 向 Plus、Team、Enterprise 與 Edu 付費使用者推出 Advanced Voice。

events.title_zh: GPT-4o 寫作與檔案分析更新
events.summary_en: OpenAI updated GPT-4o on paid ChatGPT tiers with more natural, audience-aware writing and deeper analysis of uploaded files.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 更新付費 ChatGPT 方案中的 GPT-4o，使寫作更自然且更能掌握受眾，並加深對上傳檔案的分析。

events.title_en: ChatGPT Web sidebar and responsive-experience redesign
events.title_zh: ChatGPT Web 側邊欄與響應式體驗改版
events.summary_en: OpenAI rolled out a floating sidebar, revised conversation and GPT navigation, an updated composer, improved Canvas coexistence, and a more robust mobile web experience.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出浮動側邊欄、改版的對話與 GPT 導覽、新輸入列、更佳 Canvas 並列顯示，以及更穩健的行動網頁體驗。

events.title_en: Slash commands and more coding apps on macOS
events.title_zh: macOS 新增斜線指令與更多程式 App
events.summary_en: ChatGPT macOS added slash commands for search, o1 reasoning, and DALL-E plus Work with Apps support for VS Code forks, JetBrains IDEs, and more editors and terminals.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS 新增搜尋、o1 推理與 DALL-E 的斜線指令，並將 Work with Apps 擴展至 VS Code 衍生版、JetBrains IDE 與更多編輯器、終端機。

events.title_en: Work with Apps reaches Enterprise and Edu
events.title_zh: Work with Apps 開放 Enterprise 與 Edu
events.summary_en: OpenAI expanded macOS Work with Apps to Enterprise and Edu, with an administrative control to disable it for a workspace.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 macOS Work with Apps 擴展至 Enterprise 與 Edu，並提供工作區管理員停用控制。

events.title_en: Full OpenAI o1 released in ChatGPT
events.title_zh: 完整版 OpenAI o1 登陸 ChatGPT
events.summary_en: OpenAI made the production o1 model available in ChatGPT alongside the new Pro plan, presenting it as its most intelligent model for difficult reasoning tasks.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 隨新的 Pro 方案在 ChatGPT 中提供正式版 o1，並將其定位為處理困難推理工作的最智慧模型。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched a $200-per-month plan with unlimited access to o1, o1-mini, GPT-4o, and Advanced Voice plus access to o1 pro mode.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出每月 200 美元的方案，提供 o1、o1-mini、GPT-4o 與 Advanced Voice 無上限使用，以及 o1 pro mode。

events.summary_en: ChatGPT Pro introduced an o1 mode that uses more compute and longer reasoning time to improve reliability on difficult problems.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT Pro 推出會使用更多運算與更長推理時間的 o1 模式，以提升困難問題的可靠度。

events.summary_en: OpenAI moved Sora out of research preview by launching the faster Sora Turbo as a standalone product for Plus and Pro users, with storyboards, remixing, blending, and up to 1080p 20-second output.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Sora 移出研究預覽，向 Plus 與 Pro 推出更快的獨立產品 Sora Turbo，具 Storyboard、Remix、Blend 與最高 1080p、20 秒輸出。

events.title_en: Canvas becomes default in GPT-4o for all users
events.title_zh: Canvas 成為所有使用者的 GPT-4o 預設能力
events.summary_en: OpenAI made Canvas available by default in GPT-4o to both free and paid ChatGPT users.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Canvas 設為 GPT-4o 的預設可用能力，向 ChatGPT 免費與付費使用者全面開放。

events.title_en: Canvas gains GPTs, Python execution, and shortcuts
events.title_zh: Canvas 新增 GPT、Python 執行與捷徑
events.summary_en: Canvas gained optional use inside GPTs, Python code execution with automatic bug-fix attempts, paste-to-canvas shortcuts, and a toolbox entry.
events.summary_zh: Canvas 新增在 GPT 中選用、Python 程式碼執行與自動修錯嘗試、貼上即開 Canvas 的捷徑，以及工具箱入口。

events.title_en: ChatGPT becomes available through Apple Intelligence
events.title_zh: ChatGPT 透過 Apple Intelligence 上線
events.summary_en: The ChatGPT integration in Apple Intelligence became available, while Enterprise and Edu administrators received a workspace control to enable or disable account connections.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的 Apple Intelligence 整合正式上線，Enterprise 與 Edu 管理員並獲得啟用或停用工作區帳戶連線的控制。

events.title_zh: 季節限定 Santa 語音
events.summary_en: OpenAI rolled out a temporary Santa voice globally to logged-in users across Voice surfaces, with a one-time Advanced Voice limit reset on first use.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 向全球已登入使用者的 Voice 介面推出季節限定 Santa 語音，首次使用可一次性重置 Advanced Voice 額度。

events.title_en: Video and screen sharing in Advanced Voice
events.title_zh: Advanced Voice 支援視訊與螢幕分享
events.summary_en: OpenAI began rolling real-time video, screen sharing, and image uploads in Advanced Voice on mobile to Team and most Plus and Pro users outside several European regions.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 開始在行動版 Advanced Voice 向 Team 與多數 Plus、Pro 使用者推出即時視訊、螢幕分享與圖像上傳，部分歐洲地區除外。

events.summary_en: OpenAI launched Projects for Plus, Team, and Pro users to group files, chats, and custom instructions with shared project context and tools including Canvas, data analysis, DALL-E, and Search.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 向 Plus、Team 與 Pro 推出 Projects，可將檔案、聊天與自訂指示集中並共享專案上下文，支援 Canvas、資料分析、DALL-E 與 Search。

events.title_en: ChatGPT Search available to all logged-in users
events.title_zh: ChatGPT Search 開放所有已登入使用者
events.summary_en: OpenAI expanded ChatGPT Search from paid plans to every logged-in user in regions where ChatGPT was available.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 將 ChatGPT Search 從付費方案擴展至 ChatGPT 可用地區的所有已登入使用者。

events.title_zh: 改良版 OpenAI o1 快照
events.summary_en: OpenAI released a new post-trained o1 snapshot with fewer reasoning tokens, improved benchmark performance, vision, and tool-oriented API capabilities, and said ChatGPT would update to it soon.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 發布新的後訓練 o1 快照，使用更少推理 token、改善評測表現並加入視覺與工具導向 API 能力，且表示 ChatGPT 將很快更新。
events.source_name: OpenAI o1 and new tools for developers

events.summary_en: OpenAI introduced an experimental way to access ChatGPT without an account through phone calls and WhatsApp at 1-800-CHATGPT.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出實驗性入口，可無須帳戶透過 1-800-CHATGPT 電話與 WhatsApp 使用 ChatGPT。

events.title_en: Talk with Apps and note-taking integrations on macOS
events.title_zh: macOS Talk with Apps 與筆記 App 整合
events.summary_en: ChatGPT macOS let Advanced Voice work with supported apps and expanded app context to Apple Notes, Notion, Quip, Warp, and more coding tools.
events.summary_zh: ChatGPT macOS 讓 Advanced Voice 可與支援的 App 協作，並將 App 上下文擴展至 Apple Notes、Notion、Quip、Warp 與更多程式工具。

events.summary_en: The macOS app added keyword and phrase search across prior ChatGPT conversations.
events.summary_zh: macOS App 新增可依關鍵字與片語搜尋過往 ChatGPT 對話。

events.title_en: OpenAI o3 and o3-mini preview announced
events.title_zh: 宣布 OpenAI o3 與 o3-mini 預覽
events.summary_en: OpenAI previewed its next reasoning-model family, o3 and o3-mini, and opened an early-access program for safety and security researchers rather than a general product release.
events.summary_zh: OpenAI 預覽下一代推理模型系列 o3 與 o3-mini，並向安全與資安研究者開放搶先測試；當時尚非一般產品發布。
